title: baphia massaiensis var. cornifolia
intro: Baphia massaiensis var. cornifolia is a plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to the tropical regions of Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain flavonoids and alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Baphia massaiensis var. cornifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant's roots are prepared by boiling or decocting them to make teas or infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
